title: coussarea cuatrecasasii
intro: Coussarea cuatrecasasii, also known as Cuatrecasas' Coussarea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily as an anti-inflammatory and analgesic agent. The health benefits of Coussarea cuatrecasasii include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
